positive: Minimalist geometric depiction of a majestic nocturnal owl perched on a stylized branch. The style should be highly graphic, combining elements of Art Deco and modern folk illustration. Use a limited color palette of deep sapphire blues, muted gold, matte cream, and charcoal black. The composition must be central and clean, featuring the owl in a powerful silhouette with intricate feather details using line art and negative space. The overall aesthetic should be sophisticated, vintage, and scalable for fabric printing. Studio lighting, clean vector lines, high contrast, symmetrical design, highly detailed.
negative: blurry, amateur, realistic photography, text, logo, watermark, noisy, grain, jpeg artifacts, poor anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, cluttered, busy background
